children.text: The Secretary shall first be paid an amount which bears the same ratio to the balance in such fund at the close of , as the total amount of the Federal capital contributions to such fund by the Secretary under this part bears to the sum of such Federal contributions and the institution’s capital contributions to such fund.September 30, 2017
The remainder of such balance shall be paid to the institution.

children.heading: Distribution of late collections
children.label: b Distribution of late collections
children.text: Beginning , each institution with which the Secretary has made an agreement under this part, shall pay to the Secretary the same proportionate share of amounts received by this institution after , in payment of principal and interest on student loans made from the student loan fund established pursuant to such agreement (which amount shall be determined after deduction of any costs of litigation incurred in collection of the principal or interest on loans from the fund and not already reimbursed from the fund or from such payments of principal or interest), as was determined for the Secretary under subsection (a).October 1, 2017September 30, 2017

children.label: A
children.text: The Secretary shall first be paid an amount which bears the same ratio to the total to be distributed as the Federal capital contributions by the Secretary to the student loan fund prior to such distribution bear to the sum of such Federal capital contributions and the capital contributions to the fund made by the institution.

children.label: B
children.text: The remainder of the capital distribution shall be paid to the institution.

No finding that the liquid assets of a student loan fund established under this part exceed the amount required under paragraph (1) may be made prior to a date which is 2 years after the date on which the institution of higher education received the funds from such institution’s allocation under .section 1087bb of this title
